name: Zip Tablet Pouch Blush Pink Laptop Bag - Brightroom™
description:
Keep your tablet clean and safe with the Zip Tablet Pouch from Brightroom™. This blush pink pouch is designed with interior and exterior pockets to help keep your charging accessories, notes and other essentials. Made of knitted fabric, this tablet pouch has a zipper closure to help keep the contents secure and fits laptops up to 13 inches. You can easily carry it in hand or a bag.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
